---
title: "The Rev. Henry James Warner"
---

## The Rev. Henry James Warner

**Dates:** (b.1862/3)

### Description

Vicar of Brixham and subsequently of Yealmpton

### Biography

He was ordained priest in 1888, and served from 1889 as Vicar of Brixham, Devon, until 1897 when he succeeded the Rev. George Woodhouse as Vicar of Yealmpton.  He married (1890) Edith Emma Morris.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 17th [1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
